name: Pork Stuffed Mushrooms
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the mushrooms and pat them dry. Remove the stems.
2. Chop the mushroom stems and sauté them in a pan with the sausage, garlic, and parsley until the sausage is browned. Stir to crumble the sausage.
3. Drain off any excess pan drippings.
4. Stir in the shredded cheddar cheese and mix well.
5. Spoon the mixture into the hollow caps of the mushrooms.
6. Place the stuffed mushroom caps in a 9 x 13 inch baking dish.
7. Bake at 350°F for 20 minutes.
